```java
        int num = mapper.updateUser(new User(5, "哈哈", "111111"));
        if(num>0){
            System.out.println("修改成功!");
        }

        sqlSession.close();
    }
}

  • delete

    @Delete("delete from user where id=#{uid}")
    int deleteUser(@Param("uid") int id);
    @Test
    public void test(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();

        UserMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(UserMapper.class);

        int num = mapper.deleteUser(5);
        if(num>0) {
            System.out.println("删除成功!");
        }

        sqlSession.close();
    }
}

11.2关于Param注解

  • 基本类型的参数或者String类型需要加上
  • 引用类型不需要加
  • 如果只有一个基本类型，可以忽略，建议加上
  • 我们在SQL中引用的就是在@Param(“”)中设置的属性名

12.Lombok的使用

LomBok是一款Java插件，使得Java开发者可以通过注解来消除业务工程中冗长和繁杂的代码

使用步骤

  1. 在Idea中安装LomBok插件

  2. 在pom.xml中导入插件

    <dependency>
    <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
    <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
    <version>1.18.12</version>
</dependency>

    插件中可使用的注解

    @Getter and @Setter
@FieldNameConstants
@ToString
@EqualsAndHashCode
@AllArgsConstructor, @RequiredArgsConstructor and @NoArgsConstructor
@Log, @Log4j, @Log4j2, @Slf4j, @XSlf4j, @CommonsLog, @JBossLog, @Flogger, @CustomLog
@Data
@Builder
@SuperBuilder
@Singular
@Delegate
@Value
@Accessors
@Wither
@With
@SneakyThrows
@val
@var
experimental @var
@UtilityClass

  3. 在实体类加注解

    @Data：无参构造，setter/getter，equals，toString.......
@AllArgsConstructor：所有参数的构造方法
@NoArgsConstructor：无参构造方法

13.复杂查询

13.1环境搭建

  • 导入LomBok依赖

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <version>1.18.12</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

  • 新建实体类Teacher，Student

    @Data
public class Teacher {
    private int id;
    private String name;
}
    public class Student {
    private int id;
    private String name;

    //学生关联一个老师
    private Teacher teacher;
}

  • 建立Mapper接口

    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper
        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">

<mapper namespace="cn.yunmo.dao.TeacherMapper">

</mapper>
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper
        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">

<mapper namespace="cn.yunmo.dao.StudentMapper">

</mapper>

  • 在核心配置文件中绑定Mapper接口

    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE configuration
        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd">

<!--核心配置文件-->
<configuration>

    <!--引入外部属性文件-->
    <properties resource="db.properties"/>

    <!--类别名-->
    <typeAliases>
        <package name="cn.yunmo.pojo"/>
    </typeAliases>

    <!--环境使用的是development，可以定义多个环境-->
    <environments default="development">
        <environment id="development">
            <!--事务管理，类型是JDBC-->
            <transactionManager type="JDBC"/>
            <dataSource type="POOLED">
                <property name="driver" value="${driver}"/>
                <property name="url" value="${url}"/>
                <property name="username" value="${username}"/>
                <property name="password" value="${password}"/>
            </dataSource>
        </environment>
    </environments>

    <mappers>
        <mapper resource="cn/yunmo/dao/TeacherMapper.xml"/>
        <mapper resource="cn/yunmo/dao/StudentMapper.xml"/>
    </mappers>
</configuration>

  • 测试查询是否成功

    public class MyTest {
    @Test
    public void getTeacher(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
        TeacherMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(TeacherMapper.class);
        Teacher teacher = mapper.getTeacher(1);
        System.out.println(teacher);
    }
}

13.2多对一查询

  • 多个学生，对应一个老师

  • 对于学生这边而言，多个学生关联一个老师【多对一】

  • 对于老师而言，集合，一个老师有很多学生【一对多】

13.2.1按照查询嵌套处理

@Data
public class Teacher {
    private int id;
    private String name;
}
@Data
public class Student {
    private int id;
    private String name;

    //学生关联一个老师
    private Teacher teacher;
}
<mapper namespace="cn.yunmo.dao.StudentMapper">
    <select id="getStudents" resultMap="StudentTeacher">
        select * from student
    </select>

    <resultMap id="StudentTeacher" type="Student">
        <result property="id" column="id"/>
        <result property="name" column="name"/>
        <!--复杂的属性，需要单独处理
            对象：association
            集合：collection
        -->
        <association property="teacher" column="tid" javaType="Teacher" select="getTeacher"/>
    </resultMap>

    <select id="getTeacher" resultType="Teacher">
        select * from teacher where id=#{tid};
    </select>
</mapper>

13.2.2按照结果嵌套查询

<select id="getStudents2" resultMap="StudentTeacher2">
        select s.id sid,s.name sname,t.name tname
        from student s,teacher t
        where s.tid=t.id;
    </select>

    <resultMap id="StudentTeacher2" type="Student">
        <result property="id" column="sid"/>
        <result property="name" column="sname"/>
        <association property="" javaType="Teacher">
            <result property="name" column="tname"/>
        </association>
    </resultMap>

13.3一对多查询

如一个老师有多个学生

  • 实体类

    Data
public class Teacher {
    private int id;
    private String name;

    //一个老师拥有多个学生
    private List<Student> list;
}
    @Data
public class Student {
    private int id;
    private String name;
    private int tid;
}

  • Mapper.xml

    <mapper namespace="cn.yunmo.dao.TeacherMapper">
    <!--按照结果嵌套查询-->
    <select id="getTeacher" resultMap="TeacherStudent">
        select s.id sid,s.name sname,t.name tname,t.id tid
        from student s,teacher t
        where s.tid = t.id and t.id=#{tid}
    </select>
    <resultMap id="TeacherStudent" type="Teacher">
        <result property="id" column="tid"/>
        <result property="name" column="tname"/>
        <!--集合用collection-->
        <!--javaType指定属性的类型
            集合中的泛型信息使用ofType获取
        -->
        <collection property="students" ofType="Student">
            <result property="id" column="sid"/>
            <result property="name" column="sname"/>
            <result property="tid" column="tid"/>
        </collection>
    </resultMap>


  <!--**********************按照查询嵌套处理***************************-->
  <!--
      1.先根据老师的id查询出老师
  -->
  <select id="getTeacher2" resultMap="TeacherStudent2">
      select * from teacher where id=#{tid}
  </select>
  <resultMap id="TeacherStudent2" type="Teacher">
      <collection property="students" column="id" javaType="ArrayList" ofType="Student" select="getStudentByTeacherId"/>
  </resultMap>
  <select id="getStudentByTeacherId" resultType="Student">
      select * from student where tid=#{id};
  </select>
```
  • 结果

13.4小结

  1. 关联(对象)：association 【多对一】

  2. 结合：collection 【一对多】

  3. javaType

    用来指定实体类中属性的类型

    List<Student> javaType=”List”

  4. ofType

    用来指定映射到集合中的pojo类型(泛型中的约束)

    List<Student> ofType=”Student”

14.动态SQL

什么是动态sql：就是根据不同的条件生成不同的sql语句

动态sql本质还是sql语句，只是我们可以在sql层面去执行一个逻辑文件

动态sql就是在拼接sql,我们只要保证sql的正确性，按照sql的格式，去排列组合

先在MySql中写出完整的sql语句，再对应去修改我们的动态sql实现通用

14.1搭建环境

  1. 创建数据库

    CREATE TABLE `blog` (
  `id` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '博客id',
  `title` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '博客标题',
  `author` varchar(30) NOT NULL COMMENT '博客作者',
  `creat_time` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT '创建时间',
  `views` int NOT NULL COMMENT '浏览量'
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

  2. 编写实体类

    @Data
public class Blog {
    private int id;
    private String title;
    private String author;
    private Date createTime;
    private int views;
}

14.2if

//查询博客
    List<Blog> queryBlogIf(Map map);
<select id="queryBlogIf" parameterType="map" resultType="Blog">
      select * from blog where 1=1  <!-- 1=1是为了让sql没有错误，如果不写的话，map为空则where语句将出错-->
      <if test="title != null">
      and title = #{title}
      </if>
      <if test="author != null">
          and author = #{author}
      </if>
    </select>

<!---如果传递的参数title不是null,就在sql后面追加and title = #{title}，同理author不是null,就在sql后面追加and author = #{author}->
@Test
    public void queryBlogIf(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
        BlogMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(BlogMapper.class);
        Map map = new HashMap<>();
//        map.put("title","Java如此简单");
        map.put("author","hahaa");
        List<Blog> blogs = mapper.queryBlogIf(map);
        for (Blog blog : blogs) {
            System.out.println(blog);
        }
        sqlSession.close();
    }

14.3where

where 元素只会在子元素返回任何内容的情况下才插入WHERE子句。而且，若子句的开头为 AND或OR，where元素也会将它们去除。

<select id="queryBlogIf" parameterType="map" resultType="Blog">
      select * from blog
      <where>
          <if test="title != null">
              and title = #{title}
          </if>
          <if test="author != null">
              and author = #{author}
          </if>
      </where>
    </select>

<!--
    当一个sql有where语句时，就可以使用where标签，如上：
    where标签里面的if标签成立会自动在sql后面添加一个where
    如果是第一个标签成立会自动去除and,如果if标签都不成立，则不    会追加where
-->
public void queryBlogIf(){
    SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
    BlogMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(BlogMapper.class);
    Map map = new HashMap<>();
    map.put("title","spring如此简单");
    List<Blog> blogs = mapper.queryBlogIf(map);   
    for (Blog blog : blogs) {
        System.out.println(blog);
    }
    sqlSession.close();
}

// sql-> select * from blog where title=title

14.4choose(when,otherwise)

有时候，我们不想使用所有的条件，而只是想从多个条件中选择一个使用。针对这种情况，MyBatis 提供了 choose 元素，它有点像 Java 中的 switch 语句。

List<Blog> queryBlogChoose(Map map);
<select id="queryBlogChoose" resultType="Blog">
        select * from blog
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="title != null">
                    title = #{title}
                </when>
                <when test="author != null">
                    and author = #{author}
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    and views = #{views}
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>
@Test
    public void queryBlogChoose(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
        BlogMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(BlogMapper.class);
        Map map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("title","Java如此简单");
        map.put("author","hahaa");
        map.put("views",9999);
        List<Blog> blogs = mapper.queryBlogChoose(map);
        for (Blog blog : blogs) {
            System.out.println(blog);
        }
        sqlSession.close();
    }
}

14.5set

int updateBlog(Map map);
<update id="updateBlog" parameterType="map">
        update blog
        <set>
            <if test="title != null">
                title = #{title},
            </if>
            <if test="author != null">
                author = #{author},
            </if>
        </set>
        where id = #{id};
    </update>
@Test
    public void updateBlog(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
        BlogMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(BlogMapper.class);
        Map map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("title","Python如此简单");
        map.put("author","杨奇");
        map.put("id","e8565bff5b8a456f922c786e7a1b1c44");
        mapper.updateBlog(map);
        sqlSession.close();
    }

set标签会在动态的添加一个Set关键字，并自动去掉最后一条更新语句后面的,

14.6foreach

动态 SQL 的另一个常见使用场景是对集合进行遍历

<select id="selectPostIn" resultType="domain.blog.Post">
  SELECT *
  FROM POST P
  WHERE ID in
  <foreach item="item" index="index" collection="list"
      open="(" separator="," close=")">
        #{item}
  </foreach>
</select>
//查询第1,2,3号记录的博客
    List<Blog> queryBlogByForeach(Map map);
<!--传递一个map,在map中可以存在一个集合-->
    <select id="queryBlogByForeach" parameterType="map" resultType="Blog">
        select * from blog
        <where>
            <!--这里的ids是传递过来的map集合中的key,通过可以拿到value-->
            <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" close=")" separator="or">
                id=#{id}
            </foreach>
        </where>
    </select>
 @Test
    public void queryBlogByForeach(){
        SqlSession sqlSession = MyBatisUtils.getSqlSession();
        BlogMapper mapper = sqlSession.getMapper(BlogMapper.class);
        Map map = new HashMap<>();
        ArrayList ids = new ArrayList<Integer>();
        ids.add(1);
        ids.add(2);
        ids.add(3);
        map.put("ids",ids);
        List<Blog> blogs = mapper.queryBlogByForeach(map);
        for (Blog blog : blogs) {
            System.out.println(blog);
        }
        sqlSession.close();
    }

14.7SQL片段

将一部分的功能抽取出来，方便复用

<!--一个SQL片段，可以被其他地方通过include标签引用-->
<sql id="if-title-author">
        <if test="title != null">
            and title = #{title}
        </if>
        <if test="author != null">
            and author = #{author}
        </if>
    </sql>
<update id="updateBlog" parameterType="map">
        update blog
        <set>
            <include refid="if-title-author"/>
        </set>
        where id = #{id};
    </update>

注意：

  • 最好基于单表来定义SQL片段
  • 不要存在where标签
